function.name: spatial_statistics
function.description: Calculate spatial autocorrelation statistics using Moran's I and detect spatial clustering patterns. Identifies hotspots, coldspots, and spatial outliers in geospatial datasets.

layer_name.description: The name of the layer to analyze for spatial patterns (e.g., 'SWOT November 2024', 'ICESat-2 freeboard')

geographical_area.description: The geographical area to analyze (e.g., 'Beaufort Sea', 'Arctic Ocean', 'current view'). Defaults to current view if not specified.

grid_size.description: Grid size for spatial analysis (default 16). Larger values provide more detailed analysis.

analysis_type.description: Type of spatial analysis to perform (default 'moran' for Moran's I autocorrelation)

visualize.description: Whether to highlight analysis area and patterns on the map (default true)

ui.title: Spatial Autocorrelation Analysis
ui.details: Computing spatial clustering patterns and autocorrelation statistics
